name: Classic Pulled Pork
description: Slow-smoked pulled pork, topped with our signature BBQ sauce and coleslaw, served on a brioche bun.

name: Smoked Brisket Platter
description: 12-hour smoked beef brisket, sliced to perfection. Served with pickles, onions, and two sides of your choice.

name: BBQ Ribs (Half Rack)
description: A half rack of our fall-off-the-bone pork ribs, glazed with a sweet and tangy BBQ sauce.

name: Smoked Chicken Wings
description: A dozen jumbo wings, smoked and then fried to a crispy finish. Tossed in your choice of BBQ or buffalo sauce.
